description: The warband's biggest, meanest goblin. Cut him down to win. Attacks the nearest enemy and starts each round with 2 Shield.
The horde's dark master. He knits himself back together with every strike — destroy him to win. Starts each round with 3 Shield.
An immense living monolith that anchors the legion. Bring it down to win. Slow, but starts each round with 6 Shield.
